summary: Full backend + frontend testing of iteration 16 features: Assessment Templates, System Recovery, Excel Import, CMS Cases demo_slug dropdown, Home Sections, Assign Assessment to Client. Fixed route ordering bug for Excel endpoints. All 19 backend tests pass, all 8 feature areas verified via Playwright.

design_issues.screen: CMS Cases Edit Form - Demo App Slug
issues: Uses native browser <select> element styled with dark theme class. Works correctly but not the shadcn Select component used elsewhere. Minor consistency issue.
Date field shows browser-default 'mm/dd/yyyy' placeholder — uses native <input type='date'> rather than shadcn calendar. Minor inconsistency.

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: Route GET /templates/excel-template was defined AFTER GET /templates/{template_id}, causing FastAPI to match 'excel-template' as a template_id and return 404 'Template tidak ditemukan'
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Moved GET /templates/excel-template route to appear BEFORE GET /templates/{template_id} in route declarations. Also removed duplicate excel-template route definition.

assessment_templates.details: 5 templates all Published: ERP & RFID (82 questions, 14 domains), Kebutuhan SI (5q), Digital Readiness (6q), IT Maturity (7q), IT Solution Discovery (28q, 8 domains)

system_recovery_page.details: 16 collections shown, counter 16/16 dipilih, Export button with 16 collections, Dedup button present and functional

system_recovery_dedup.details: Clicking 'Jalankan Dedup' ran successfully, toast 'Dedup selesai: 0 dokumen duplikat dihapus' shown

system_recovery_export.details: Export ZIP and JSON both return 200 with correct content-type headers

import_excel_button.details: Import Excel button visible in Templates tab, dialog opens with form fields (Nama ID, Nama EN, Deskripsi, Pilih File, download template link)

excel_template_download.details: GET /api/assessment/templates/excel-template returns xlsx file after route ordering fix

demo_app_slug_dropdown.details: CMS Cases edit form shows native <select> with 3 options: '— Pilih Demo —', 'KN3 — WMS & Inventory', 'Garment Serial Tracking'

assign_assessment_templates.details: All 5 templates visible in assign dialog dropdown: ERP & RFID, Kebutuhan SI, Digital Readiness, IT Maturity, IT Solution Discovery

critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering in FastAPI: always define static routes (e.g. /templates/excel-template) BEFORE parameterized routes (e.g. /templates/{template_id}). This is a critical FastAPI pattern — parameterized routes capture any path segment unless more specific routes come first.

Excel import endpoint at /api/assessment/templates/import-excel is also after /{template_id} — verify POST import-excel is working (POST routes don't conflict with GET /{template_id} since different HTTP method, but worth documenting).
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Seeded data (KN3 template, home blocks) confirmed present from startup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 features from iteration 16 are working. Key fix: assessment router Excel route ordering bug was fixed (excel-template route moved before {template_id}). Backend 100%, Frontend 100%. Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_features_iteration16.py with 19 tests covering templates, system recovery (16 collections), excel import/export, CMS home-blocks, CMS cases demo_slug.

rca_of_issue.root_cause: FastAPI routes are matched in declaration order. The route @router.get('/templates/{template_id}') was declared at line ~103, BEFORE @router.get('/templates/excel-template') at line ~217. When a request for /templates/excel-template arrived, FastAPI matched it to the {template_id} pattern first, treating 'excel-template' as a template ID. Since no template had ID 'excel-template', it returned 404.
rca_of_issue.fix: Moved the static /templates/excel-template route declaration to appear BEFORE the parameterized /templates/{template_id} route in assessment.py
rca_of_issue.prevention: Always declare static/literal routes before parameterized routes in FastAPI routers
